title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Price Target and Stock Forecast
text: SolarEdge Technologies Stock Forecast Analysis. Analyst Price Targets: Based on 20 Wall Street analysts offering 12-month price targets over the last 3 months, the average price target is 37.00 with a high forecast of 49.00 and a low forecast of 24.00. Another forecast from 21 analysts places the average 12-month price target at 39.76 USD, with a high of 100 USD and a low of 24 USD. Analyst Consensus Rating: SolarEdge Technologies has a consensus rating of Hold, based on 1 buy rating, 15 hold ratings and 4 sell ratings. The 18 analysts covering the stock have a consensus rating of Hold and an average price target of 30.97. Recent Stock Performance: SolarEdge surged 13.91% on strong demand growth expectations ahead of a tax credit deadline, significantly outperforming the technology sector's 0.23% gain. Q1 2026 Results: The company reported first-quarter 2026 earnings with revenue of 310 million, which surpassed the anticipated 307.3 million. Key Takeaway: Analysts remain cautious on SolarEdge despite recent positive momentum, with mixed sentiments reflected in the Hold consensus rating and considerable divergence in price targets ranging from around 6.90 to 100.
